description: As the IT Security Admin, conduct an immediate access remediation following a SOC2 audit finding. For all users currently holding 'Superuser' permissions who are not in the 'IT Administration' department, revoke their 'Superuser' access and assign them to the 'Department Managers' permission group. Additionally, deactivate the account for former contractor Eric Vance (username: evance) in the 'External Contractors' department and check in his assigned hardware asset (ASSET-EXT-01) so its status returns to 'Ready to Deploy'. Generate a plain text report at /home/ga/Desktop/access_remediation_report.txt listing the usernames of the non-IT managers whose Superuser privileges were revoked, with one username per line.
